message:
chore(doctor): remove daemon references for post-daemon architecture

Update doctor system to reflect current architecture where there is no
daemon process. Changes: remove "daemons" from lock contention comments
in dolt.go, update "Daemon will fail to start" to "Operations may fail"
in integrity.go, rename daemon-specific test to legacy daemon patterns
test in gitignore_test.go.

Closes: bd-mxvai
